name: @kmmuntasir/pi-nested-subagents
description_en: A pi extension that brings Claude Code-style autonomous sub-agents to pi, with safe configurable nesting depth and built-in ground-truth verification. Fork of tintinweb/pi-subagents.
description_zh: 一个 pi 扩展，将 Claude Code 式的自主子代理引入 pi，具有可配置的安全嵌套深度和内置的真相验证。tintinweb/pi-subagents 的分支。
